sentences.arabic: لَا تَقْتَصِرُ فَوَائِدُ الرِّيَاضَةِ عَلَى بِنَاءِ الْعَضَلَاتِ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ تَمْتَدُّ لِتَشْمَلَ الصِّحَّةَ النَّفْسِيَّةَ أَيْضًا.
sentences.translation: Prednosti sporta nisu ograničene samo na izgradnju mišića, već se protežu i na mentalno zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: The benefits of sports are not limited to muscle building alone, but extend to include mental health as well.

sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ الْأَنْشِطَةُ الْبَدَنِيَّةُ الْمُنْتَظَمَةُ عَلَى تَحْفِيزِ إِفْرَازِ هُرْمُونَاتِ السَّعَادَةِ الَّتِي تُقَلِّلُ مِنَ التَّوَتُّرِ وَالْقَلَقِ.
sentences.translation: Redovne fizičke aktivnosti rade na stimulisanju lučenja hormona sreće koji smanjuju stres i anksioznost.
sentences.translationEn: Regular physical activities work to stimulate the secretion of happiness hormones that reduce stress and anxiety.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلْمَشْيِ السَّرِيعِ أَوْ مُمَارَسَةِ السِّبَاحَةِ أَنْ يُحَسِّنَ كَفَاءَةَ الْقَلْبِ وَالْجِهَازِ التَّنَفُّسِيِّ بِشَكْلٍ مَلْحُوظٍ.
sentences.translation: Brzo hodanje ili plivanje mogu značajno poboljšati efikasnost srca i respiratornog sistema.
sentences.translationEn: Brisk walking or swimming can noticeably improve the efficiency of the heart and respiratory system.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ الِالْتِزَامُ بِجَدْوَلٍ رِيَاضِيٍّ ثَابِتٍ بَدَلًا مِنَ الْقِيَامِ بِمَجْهُودٍ شَاقٍّ لِفَتْرَةٍ قَصِيرَةٍ ثُمَّ التَّوَقُّفِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je pridržavati se fiksnog rasporeda vježbanja umjesto ulaganja napornog truda u kratkom periodu, a zatim prestajanja.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to commit to a steady exercise schedule instead of putting in a strenuous effort for a short period and then stopping.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ دَمْجَ الْحَرَكَةِ فِي الْحَيَاةِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ يُعَدُّ اسْتِثْمَارًا طَوِيلَ الْأَمَدِ فِي جَوْدَةِ الْحَيَاةِ وَطُولِ الْعُمْرِ.
sentences.translation: Integrisanje kretanja u svakodnevni život smatra se dugoročnom investicijom u kvalitet života i dugovječnost.
sentences.translationEn: Integrating movement into daily life is considered a long-term investment in quality of life and longevity.
